message:
fix: address critical type conflicts and bugs in agent modules

## Critical Fixes

1. **SessionPhase type mismatch**: Created distinct `PersonaPhaseGroup` type
   for agent-personas.ts to avoid conflict with SessionPhase in types.ts.
   Added `mapSessionPhaseToPersonaGroup()` to convert between detailed phases
   (level_split, exclusion_test, etc.) and grouped phases (operators, agents, etc.)

2. **HypothesisCard property errors in dispatch.ts**: Fixed references to
   non-existent properties (name→id, claim→statement, category→domain,
   removed anchors reference). Also added impossibleIfTrue section.

3. **useRef type error**: Fixed React 19 useRef<T>() → useRef<T | null>(null)
   in useOperatorSession.ts

4. **Dead code cleanup**: Removed unused TRIBUNAL_AGENTS, TRIBUNAL_ORDER,
   and AgentPersona imports from dispatch.ts

## Type System Changes

- PersonaPhaseGroup: New type for simplified agent activation phases
- SessionPhase: Deprecated alias pointing to PersonaPhaseGroup
- mapSessionPhaseToPersonaGroup(): Maps detailed phases to groups

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -484,7 +484,8 @@ export type {
   TribunalAgentConfig,
 
   // Agent persona types (beads njiu, oytk)
-  SessionPhase as AgentSessionPhase,
+  PersonaPhaseGroup,
+  SessionPhase as AgentSessionPhase, // Deprecated alias
   InvocationTrigger,
   AgentBehavior,
   InteractionPattern,
@@ -507,6 +508,9 @@ export {
   // Type guards
   isTribunalAgentRole,
 
+  // Phase mapping (converts detailed SessionPhase to PersonaPhaseGroup)
+  mapSessionPhaseToPersonaGroup,
+
   // Agent personas (beads njiu, oytk)
   DEVILS_ADVOCATE_PERSONA,
   EXPERIMENT_DESIGNER_PERSONA,
